title: Sports & Football Intern (Part time/ Full time) at Ministry Of Football Sports
description:
Sports & Football Intern (Part time/ Full time) at Ministry Of Football Sports


Apply by emailing cover letter and resume to hiring@ministryoffootball.com.sg (we MUST receive an email application from you. (do not only apply via this portal)).

(please do not call or whatsapp, as our phone lines do not handle employment, only our email application process).

We want Interns !


Apply: hiring@ministryoffootball.com.sg


Join us for the greatest football experience in Singapore! Our team and individual footballer profiles ecosystem, golden glove, golden boot and many more cool features! See our website and facebook page to witness for yourself the amazing football journeys out footballers take with us


*MOF’s coaching internship is the perfect way to get a foot into the football coaching scene. At your internship you will be given a good overview of what the football commercial and educational scenes in Singapore are, and given the opportunity to assist in our MOF Academy where kids aged 5-14 years old are taught football by our qualified coaches.


Saturday mornings 9-11am

Sunday mornings 9-11am evenings 5-7pm

At our different Academy venues


See our website and facebook page to witness for yourself the amazing football journeys out footballers take with us:

http://ministryoffootball.com.sg

https://www.facebook.com/mof.com.sg

https://www.instagram.com/ministryoffootball/

Interested applicants MUST apply by resume and cover letter through email.



See our website and facebook page to witness for yourself the amazing football journeys out footballers take with us:

http://ministryoffootball.com.sg

https://www.facebook.com/mof.com.sg

https://www.instagram.com/ministryoffootball/

Interested applicants MUST apply by resume and cover letter through emailing hiring@ministryoffootball.com.sg. We MUST receive an email application from you in order to consider you

postedCompany.description:
MOF IS SINGAPORE’S TOP 11-A-SIDE FOOTBALL LEAGUES, CUPS & COMPETITIONS ORGANIZER!

Well-organized and co-ordinated: no venue mix-ups or miscommunication
Deliver what we promise: weekly games are weekly games, no gaps (save for postponements)
Easily reachable and responsive hotlines
Professional and clear in our communication
Well-covered by photographers to highlight your football journey
Prepares for contingencies, such as standby referees etc. 
Fast & efficient in dealing with problems
Happy to hear feedback with humility
Firm in the enforcement of rules & regulations (afterall football is a sport), but fair in making judgments

See all our brands
http://ministryoffootball.com.sg/ 
https://www.facebook.com/mof.com.sg
11aside leagues and friendlies: day & night!


https://ministryoffutsal.com/
https://www.facebook.com/MOFfutsal/
 futsal tournaments divided into super,major,minor,leisure


http://ministryoffootball.com.sg/mof-football-courses-for-adults 
Adult Football Courses! 


http://mofacademy.com.sg/ 
https://www.facebook.com/MOFacademyfootball
our youth academy for ages 5-16


http://ministryofsports.com.sg/

a multi-sport platform of over 30 sports

our sports marketing for professional footballers & sportsmen & women

where to watch football, eat, drink, party!
